summary: Completed testing of code quality refactoring changes. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - admin dashboard, member portal, and Agreement page all load correctly without console errors. The refactored auto_invoice.py and import_data.py are working correctly.

minor.issue: Still uses hardcoded credentials 'admin123' instead of shared conftest.py credentials 'password'. Tests may fail if run independently.

Backend: POST /api/auto-invoice/generate endpoint exists and works

Backend: GET /api/auto-invoice/runs returns list of runs
Backend: POST /api/import/clients endpoint exists
Backend: Import endpoint returns proper result structure

Backend: Import duplicate company returns error
Backend: GET /api/companies returns list
Backend: Companies have expected fields
Backend: GET /api/invoices returns list

Frontend: Admin login page loads correctly
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads without console errors
Frontend: Agreement (LLA Generator) page loads correctly
Frontend: Member portal login works
Frontend: Member dashboard loads without console errors
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ auto_invoice.py refactoring verified - @router.post('/generate') decorator is present and working
✅ auto_invoice.py helper functions (_filter_eligible_companies, _calculate_meeting_room_charges, _build_monthly_line_item, _build_invoice_document, _attach_pdf) are working correctly
✅ import_data.py refactoring verified - parsing helpers (_parse_int, _parse_float, _parse_date, _build_company_document, _ensure_default_plan) are working correctly
✅ DOMPurify sanitization in Agreement.jsx (line 463) is correctly implemented
✅ useCallback for refreshProfile in MemberAuthContext.jsx (line 85) is correctly implemented
✅ conftest.py provides shared test credentials (admin@thryve.in/password, info@tbhcircle.com/password)
⚠️ test_auth.py still uses hardcoded 'admin123' password instead of conftest.py credentials - minor inconsistency
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test companies: TEST_Refactor_Import_Company, TEST_Duplicate_Company
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring verified. Key changes: 1) auto_invoice.py refactored with helper functions and @router.post('/generate') decorator working, 2) import_data.py refactored with parsing helpers working, 3) Agreement.jsx uses DOMPurify.sanitize() for XSS protection, 4) MemberAuthContext.jsx uses useCallback for refreshProfile. All endpoints working correctly. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_code.py created for regression testing.
